Here&#39;s what the numbers actually mean for your team.</p> Mon, 11 May 2026 05:00:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/spons/declining-fraud-rates-dont-mean-declining-fraud-risk/819493/ Mattel shareholder pushes company to explore sale https://www.retaildive.com/news/mattel-activist-shareholder-pushes-sale-hasbro-private-equity/819681/ <p>The investment management firm laid out scenerios where the toy company could be acquired by private equity, Hasbro or a media business.&nbsp;</p> Kaarin Moore Fri, 08 May 2026 12:34:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/mattel-activist-shareholder-pushes-sale-hasbro-private-equity/819681/ The Weekly Closeout: ThredUp’s revenue jump and the interview that shook retail https://www.retaildive.com/news/ryan-cohen-gamestop-ebay-interview-thredup-q1-earnings/819613/ <figure><div><img src="https://imgproxy.divecdn.com/1s_zT1VceHnAZ1Iyzpo33Y9VVx3xtQXq3k2vA8BczNU/g:ce/rs:fill:1600:900:1/Z3M6Ly9kaXZlc2l0ZS1zdG9yYWdlL2RpdmVpbWFnZS9DbGVhbm91dHNfYW5kX0NhdGVnb3JpZXMtMDAzLVg0LmpwZw==.webp"/></div></figure><p>The resale platform also saw active buyers grow, while the only thing more surprising than GameStop&rsquo;s bid on eBay may have been the events that followed.</p> Retail Dive Staff Fri, 08 May 2026 12:22:00 -0400 https://www.retaildive.com/news/ryan-cohen-gamestop-ebay-interview-thredup-q1-earnings/819613/
